arts.ttl: Birmingham’s quick-fire double enough to see off Burton
arts.sum: Alfons Sampsted and top scorer Jay Stansfield netted for Blues.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City must brace themselves for a series of lazy snubs
arts.sum: Birmingham City could claim a double at the EFL Awards dinner on April 27 – but don’t expect their dominance in League One to be reflected in the Team of the Year. Chris Davies has been nominated for the Manager of the Year award and Japanese midfielder Tomoki Iwata is up for the Player of the Year gong.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City will ‘look’ to sell 2022 signing this summer, report claims
arts.sum: Birmingham City ‘will look to offload’ left-back Emmanuel Longelo this summer, as detailed in a report by BirminghamLive.… The post Birmingham City will ‘look’ to sell 2022 signing this summer, report claims appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Kieran Dowell absence explained as Chris Davies makes Birmingham City promise for final five
arts.sum: Birmingham City played out a goalless draw with Crawley Town on Good Friday and go to Burton Albion on Monday Kieran Dowell missed Birmingham City’s draw with Crawley Town due to illness and should return in time for Monday’s meeting with Burton Albion.

arts.ttl: Six players might have already played their last game for Birmingham City
arts.sum: They are all out on loan for a reason: because Davies couldn’t find room in his plans for them this season and that isn’t likely to change. Blues signed 17 new players last summer, including several with the Championship in mind, so there doesn’t need to be an enormous turnaround this year.

arts.ttl: What Lee Myung-jae’s debut proved as Birmingham City transfer need highlighted
arts.sum: There was nothing in Lee Myung-jae’s 20-minute cameo to suggest he isn’t good enough to play for Blues in League One. The South Korean looked athletic, energetic and slightly more attack-minded than Alex Cochrane. If Blues avoid defeat to Mansfield next weekend they will have completed a league season unbeaten at home for just the fourth time in their history.

arts.ttl: Preview: Burton Albion vs. Birmingham City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League One clash between Burton Albion and Birmingham City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
